plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

plugins.successComment:
:tada: This ${issue.pull_request ? 'PR is included' : 'issue has been resolved'} in version ${nextRelease.version} :tada:

The release is available on:
- [GitHub Release](${nextRelease.releaseUrl})
- [npm package (@${nextRelease.name}})](https://www.npmjs.com/package/${nextRelease.name})
plugins.failComment: :x: The automated release failed for commit ${context.sha}. Please check the logs and try again.
